title: hieracium verbascifolium subsp. melandryifolium
intro: Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. melandryifolium, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and wounds, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. melandryifolium include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, while also being used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Hieracium verbascifolium subsp. melandryifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and creams.
